reasoning: The visualization fails to answer the specific business question, which asks for the total revenue ('Wieviel Umsatz') per year from 2021 to 2024. Instead, it presents a granular monthly breakdown using overlapping bar charts (or potentially grouped bars depending on rendering), which makes it difficult to quickly assess the annual totals. Furthermore, there are significant data integrity issues: 1) The annotations contain factual errors (e.g., claiming 'Lowest in Feb 2023' when December 2023 was 308.46 and July/August/October 2024 were lower; also misidentifying November 2021 as the highest point globally, whereas June 2022 is clearly higher). 2) The 2024 data series appears truncated or incorrect in the last two months (showing 0.0 for Oct/Nov/Dec instead of the source values like 2171.52, 89776.96, 1682.98). A simple aggregated bar chart showing one bar per year would be far more effective.
suggested_improvement: Aggregate the monthly sales data into annual sums for 2021-2024 and display them as a single bar chart with four bars (one per year). This directly answers 'how much revenue' per year. Ensure all data points are included correctly without truncation.
